data.title: Bango partners with MTN SA to use Digital Vending Machine for subscription bundling, reaching 16 markets in Africa.
data.description: In Cambridge, UK on September 12, 2025, Bango, a leading subscription bundling company, revealed a significant partnership with MTN South Africa, a subsidiary of MTN Group, the largest mobile network operator across 16 African markets. The collaboration aims to utilize Bango's Digital Vending Machine® (DVM™) to enhance MTN SA's subscription bundling services. By leveraging this partnership, MTN SA customers will enjoy effortless access to top-notch subscription offerings.

data.title: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) named one of the World's Best Companies by TIME in 2025 list. -Approx 100 characters
data.description: In Los Angeles, KB Home, a prominent homebuilder in the U.S. (NYSE: KBH), has achieved a significant milestone by being included in TIME's prestigious 2025 list of World's Best Companies. TIME, in collaboration with Statista, a reputable consumer data provider, bestowed this recognition upon KB Home. Jeffrey Mezger, the Chairman and CEO of KB Home, expressed immense gratitude for this honor. This acknowledgment underscores the company's commitment to excellence and success. The list is accessible on TIME's website, solidifying KB Home's position among the top global corporations.

data.title: KB Home opens Cielo Reserve, new community in Tucson's Valencia Corridor; single-story homes near downtown. #KBH #Tucson #CieloReserve
data.description: KB Home (stock ticker: KBH) unveiled the grand opening of Cielo Reserve, a new housing development in Tucson, Arizona. This development offers single-story homes located in the Valencia Corridor, a vibrant area near downtown Tucson. This location is known for its pedestrian-friendly streets, unique shopping options, and popular restaurants. The homes are crafted to suit modern living preferences, with key features such as contemporary kitchens that open into spacious great rooms. KB Home is recognized as one of the leading homebuilders in the United States, providing trustworthy and quality housing options.

OFFICIALS TO BRIEF ON MANHUNT State and federal officials will hold a 9 a.m. ET news conference on the search for the suspect in the killing of conservative activist Charlie Kirk. Authorities have released video showing the suspect fleeing the scene.

data.title: BTC hash rate and difficulty reach all-time highs, miners hold 90-day peak supply; experts predict bullish trend ahead.
data.description: Miners have reached their highest holdings in the past 90 days, with the hash rate and difficulty levels also hitting record highs. This development has experts predicting a significant upward movement for Bitcoin in the near future.

data.title: DPM Metals changes name from Dundee Precious Metals after shareholder approval. Effective September 12, 2025.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, DPM Metals Inc. (TSX: DPM) formerly known as Dundee Precious Metals Inc. finalized its name change, approved by shareholders on August 13, 2025. The company is based in Toronto and operates under its new name as of the announcement date. The change aligns with the company's revised strategic direction.

data.title: BCH price reaches $590 support, trading at $589.80 (-1.60% in 24h) with RSI at 53.48. Resistance is at $634.30.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Bitcoin Cash is currently being traded at $589.80, reflecting a decrease of 1.60% in the past 24 hours. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for BCH is at a neutral level of 53.48. There is notable resistance anticipated at $634.30. Various momentum indicators are showing conflicting signals regarding the future movement of Bitcoin Cash.

data.title: Quantum BioPharma's licensee Unbuzzd Wellness to hold Investor Webinar on Sep 16, 2025 at 1:30 PM PT for its "game-changing" beverage unbuzzd.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Quantum BioPharma Ltd. shared that its licensee, Unbuzzd Wellness Inc., will be hosting an Investor Webinar on September 16, 2025. The webinar is set to take place at 1:30 p.m. Pacific time and 4:30 p.m. Eastern Standard Time. Quantum BioPharma is a biopharmaceutical company focusing on creating innovative solutions for neurodegenerative and metabolic disorders, as well as alcohol misuse disorders. Unbuzzd Wellness Inc. is recognized for unbuzzd TM, a beverage that speeds up alcohol metabolism, enhances mental clarity, and alleviates hangover symptoms.

data.title: UNI price surpasses key moving averages amidst bullish sentiment. UNI at $9.97, gains 1.32% daily with strong volume.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Uniswap (UNI) is currently trading at $9.97, reflecting a daily increase of 1.32%. The trading signals are bullish with the MACD indicating a positive trend. Additionally, the price has surpassed short-term moving averages, supported by high trading volume.

data.title: AVAX surpasses $28, now at $28.47 with RSI at 64.22, indicating upward potential despite 1.76% drop.
data.description: The Avalanche cryptocurrency, AVAX, is currently trading at $28.47. Despite experiencing a 1.76% decrease in its daily value, the technical indicators suggest a bullish trend. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 64.22, indicating the potential for further upward movement in the price of AVAX.

data.title: Fairfax India to sell its stake in Saurashtra Freight Private Limited.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, showing a positive trend in the job market. The economy added over 200,000 jobs last month, exceeding expectations of economists. Additionally, the stock market has reached record highs, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average breaking the 35,000 mark. This data suggests a strong recovery and growth in the economy, providing hope for continued improvement in the future.
